name: Cafe Au Lait Luzianne
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and heavy cream in a saucepan; bring to a boil, allowing small bubbles to form around the edge of the pan, then remove from heat.
2. Pour a small amount of coffee into each serving cup.
3. Add the remaining coffee and hot milk mixture to each cup until they are about 3/4 full.
NOTE: Skim milk can be substituted for milk and cream for those who are counting calories.
